<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-1_chunk005.pdf#page=10 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p218 -->

HERRENCHIEMSEE


[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p010_img001.jpg|thumb|3 Heilung des Wassersüchtigen]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p010_img002.jpg|thumb|2 Hochzeit zu Kana]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p010_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p010_img004.jpg|thumb|4 Wunderbare Brotvermehrung]]


217
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p219 -->
